allow: PowerShell($url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills/main/CLAUDE.md"; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\CLAUDE.md"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Downloaded successfully"; Write-Host "---"; Get-Content $dest | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Host "..."; Write-Host "Total lines: $\(\(Get-Content $dest | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)" } catch { Write-Host "multica-ai failed, trying forrestchang..."; $url2 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills/main/CLAUDE.md"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url2 -OutFile $dest -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Downloaded from forrestchang"; Write-Host "Total lines: $\(\(Get-Content $dest | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)" })
